stemHtml: For a take-off in a large aeroplane, what is the relationship between the CG and the stabiliser trim setting?

options.a: The location of the CG does NOT affect the stabiliser trim setting for take-off.
options.b: With a more forward CG, a more nose-down stabiliser trim setting is required.
options.c: With a more aft CG, the greater nose-up stabiliser trim setting is required.
options.d: With a more aft CG, a lower nose-up stabiliser trim setting is required.
